The question is asking to determine whether Retief Goosen is ranked above or below K.J. Choi in the player rankings. Since there is a "place" column indicating the position of each player, we can sort the data using the f_sort_column(place) operation with the order "small to large" to see the actual ranking of the players. Sorting the place column in "small to large" order will show the players from highest rank (smallest number) to lowest rank (largest number), allowing us to compare their positions.

Explanation: Retief Goosen is placed at position 1, while K.J. Choi is placed at position t7 (tied for 7th). Since position 1 is higher (better) than position t7, Retief Goosen is above K.J. Choi in the ranking.

judge_thought:

- Retief Goosen is in 1st place.
